Oil prices edge up on stimulus support despite ample supplies

holdings.infoBox: DRIP is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily S&P Oil & Gas Exp. & Prod. Bear 2X ETF (DRIP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund provides 2x inverse daily exposure to an equal-weighted index of the largest oil and gas exploration and production companies in the US. DRIP was launched on May 28, 2015 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Oil prices edge up on stimulus support despite ample supplies
data.text: Oil prices nudged up on Monday, with Brent futures set to post a fifth straight monthly gain, as global stimulus measures underpin prices even as demand struggles to return to pre-COVID levels in a we...

data.title: Oil Bear ETFs Dig Claws in at Chart Support
data.text: Here's why energy stocks may come under pressure in the month ahead. Trade a pullback with these three inverse ETFs.

data.title: Bull and bear oil ETFs decline Tuesday
data.text: An exchange-traded fund that takes a bullish bet on the energy sector tumbled 15% on Tuesday, extending its 12-month losses to 99%.

data.title: Inverse Energy ETFs Soar Amid Global Slowdown Fears
data.text: Oil prices skidded Wednesday after weak economic data and a surprise build in inventories rattled energy markets.
